name: Sticky Teriyaki Chicken Traybake with Shiitake & Feta
description: A sticky teriyaki-glazed chicken traybake roasted with sweet potatoes, bell peppers, zucchini, red onions, and shiitake mushrooms, finished with lime zest, chili flakes, cashews, sesame seeds, spring onions, and crumbled feta.

ingredientSections.heading: Protein
items: 400-450g chicken (thigh for juicier, breast for leaner)

ingredientSections.heading: Teriyaki Glaze
items: 1.5 tsp sesame oil or olive oil
1 small splash balsamic or rice vinegar

ingredientSections.heading: Toppings
items: Chili flakes or sriracha to taste

steps: Roughly chop all vegetables. Toss with 2-3 tbsp olive oil, salt, and pepper. Spread on a large baking tray (or 2) — use plenty of surface area so veggies roast rather than steam.
Mix all teriyaki glaze ingredients together.
Place chicken on top of the vegetables and coat generously with the glaze.
Remove tray, toss the vegetables, and drizzle an extra small spoonful of teriyaki over the shiitake mushrooms.
Bake for another 15 minutes. Optionally switch to grill/broil for the last 5 minutes.
Remove from oven and finish with lime zest and juice, chili flakes, cashews, sesame seeds, sliced spring onions, and crumbled feta.
notes: For 3 servings, use plenty of tray space — better to use 2 trays than to overcrowd. Overcrowding causes steaming instead of roasting, which reduces flavor.
